quotes.text: “The more that you read, the more things you will know. The more that you learn, the more places you'll go.”
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: “Of course it is happening inside your head, Harry, but why on earth should that mean that it is not real?”
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.text: “The truth is, everyone is going to hurt you. You just got to find the ones worth suffering for.”
quotes.author: Bob Marley
